model.Administrator

Description
controller
 
model

  • Uses of Administrator in controller

    Methods in controller that return types with arguments of type Administrator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Administrator>
    LoginController.getAllAdministrators()
    Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method of the AdministratorDAO implementation and returns it.
    Methods in controller with parameters of type Administrator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    LoginController.checkUser(Administrator user)
    Checks if an administrator's credentials are valid.
    boolean
    LoginController.insertAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
    boolean
    LoginController.updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method of the AdministratorDAO implementation with the provided administrator object and returns the result.

  • Uses of Administrator in model

    Methods in model that return Administrator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    Administrator
    AdministratorDAO.getAdministratorByName(String name)
    Retrieves an administrator by name by calling the getAdministratorByName method with the provided name and returns the result.
    Administrator
    DBImplementationAdministrator.getAdministratorByName(String name)
    This method retrieves an administrator from the database based on the provided name.
    Methods in model that return types with arguments of type Administrator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    List<Administrator>
    AdministratorDAO.getAllAdministrators()
    Retrieves a list of all administrators by calling the getAllAdministrators method
    List<Administrator>
    DBImplementationAdministrator.getAllAdministrators()
    This method retrieves a list of all administrators from the database.
    Methods in model with parameters of type Administrator
    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    boolean
    AdministratorDAO.checkUser(Administrator user)
    Checks if an administrator exists by calling the checkAdminExists method with the provided name and returns the result.
    boolean
    DBImplementationAdministrator.checkUser(Administrator administrator)
    This method checks if the provided administrator's credentials (name and password) exist in the database.
    boolean
    AdministratorDAO.insertUser(Administrator user)
    Inserts a new administrator by calling the insertUser method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
    boolean
    DBImplementationAdministrator.insertUser(Administrator user)
    This method inserts a new administrator into the database.
    boolean
    AdministratorDAO.updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    Updates an administrator by calling the updateAdministrator method with the provided administrator object and returns the result.
    boolean
    DBImplementationAdministrator.updateAdministrator(Administrator admin)
    This method updates an administrator's password in the database.
